c1 = c(10.41361901, 11.28410531, 11.2648436, 11.34807305, 11.36389503, 11.27587683, 11.31642668, 10.62373086)
c2 = c(10.40758143, 11.2276586, 11.27322839, 11.41745612, 11.34230711, 11.33966863, 11.17856457, 10.65468156)

cnbp = (c1+c2)/2

#NIE
b1 = c(5.131888571, 4.443001427, 4.438590933, 4.542974277, 4.735459797, 4.726055491, 5.013328959, 5.954112499)
b2 = c(5.048868689, 4.500799421, 4.788626571, 4.671849511, 4.588191342, 4.725371275, 4.73073062, 6.091701289)

btbd8 = (b1+b2)/2

d1 = c(6.902676168, 7.916619317, 8.629066987, 8.526174779, 8.720049109, 8.661763331, 8.415065177, 7.759177371)
d2 = c(6.796428573, 7.960773414, 8.66402529, 8.490482884, 8.61463391, 8.568239348, 8.327257287, 7.695945102)

dars2 = (d1+d2)/2
